description: As an agricultural risk actuary, evaluate the use of global reanalysis data for high-altitude coffee crop insurance in the Colombian Coffee Axis (5°N, 75°W). Using Panoply and the climate datasets in ~/PanoplyData/, extract 12-month temperature and precipitation profiles via 1D line plots to complete the methodological veto memo located at ~/Desktop/insurance_model_mandate.txt. The memo must demonstrate how coarse grid resolution artifacts, topographic smoothing, and grid-cell averaging affect the apparent local temperature. Deliver all required output files to ~/Documents/AgriRisk/ as specified in the mandate.

metadata.occupation: Agricultural Risk Actuary / Climate Data Methodologist
